summary: Resolved review-v1 (2 HIGH, both APPLY, test/tracking only). ISSUE-1: the committed gateway test failed `corepack pnpm typecheck` — pass-001's lint fix removed the mock's url param, making the param-less mock's call-args tuple [], so `fetchImpl.mock.calls[0]![0] as URL` tripped TS2493/TS2352 (typecheck was run before that lint fix and not re-run). Fix: the URL-construction test now captures the request URL via a USED typed closure param (`vi.fn(async (input: URL) => { url = input; return geocode('OK',[{}]); })` + `toBeInstanceOf(URL)` + narrowing throw) instead of reading mock.calls — no tuple index, lint-clean, all original assertions preserved (https/host/path/encoded address/key). ISSUE-2: server/src/routes/maps.test.ts was untracked (pass-001 git-added routes/maps.ts but not its .test.ts); now committed so HEAD carries the required no-DB route coverage (disabled success, mock success, typed 502 failure, config_error 500, back-compat 404). No production map code (config.ts/gateway.ts/routes/maps.ts/app.ts/index.ts/shared/maps.ts) changed. RESOLVED appended below the sentinel. Committed 204c64c.
checks: corepack pnpm typecheck (PASS — was the blocking failure; now green)
